name: 折叠刀（★） | 蓝钢
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been cold blued. This is the malbec of weapon design - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这把武器已完全被染蓝。 堪称武器设计中的马尔贝克 - 军火商布兹
